en_body:
Neither river, nor home
Midway beneath the standing sun, beating the song's rhythm
Neither river, nor home
Head bearing Heaven, feet treading Earth—here am I

Song is the song of Heaven-Earth-Human
Song is the song of heroes creating their Time
I sing with my mouth,
I stride with my feet
Beat the rhythm with my heart

Neither homeland, nor home
From within the Righteous Heart the rhythm sounds.

(Shreveport, Louisiana, 1984)
note: “Heaven-Earth-Human” renders the traditional East Asian triad Thiên-Địa-Nhân.
